overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character moves from a busy commercial street up a large staircase into darker back alleys and covered walkways, showcasing the game's detailed cyberpunk environment with vibrant neon signage and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with retail storefronts

events.description: futuristic sedan drives past on the street from right to left
moving from street curb into pedestrian plaza area approaching stairs

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk past the CAL EXPRESS building, observing the neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street, passing from right to left

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent green neon CAL EXPRESS signage
modern cylindrical building with red facade and horizontal window strips
sleek silver car with illuminated elements driving on the street
various colorful neon advertisements and store signs illuminating the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a bustling neon-lit commercial street at night. The CAL EXPRESS building dominates the left side with its green neon signage, while a distinctive red curved building stands on the right. A futuristic sedan drives past on the street as the character moves along the concrete sidewalk toward a pedestrian plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: large outdoor staircase between industrial buildings

events.description: character begins ascending the wide concrete staircase
reaching the top of the stairs, transitioning to darker upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase between tall buildings, following other pedestrians upward

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking up the stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: wide stone staircase ascending between buildings with multiple flights
large industrial pipes running vertically along the left wall
tall red neon sign mounted on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand concrete staircase flanked by industrial buildings. Large teal pipes run along the left wall while a bright red neon sign illuminates the right side. Other pedestrians climb ahead as the environment becomes more enclosed, transitioning from the open street to an upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level alley with food stalls and steam vents

events.description: entering darker alley area with green neon lighting and steam atmosphere
approaching and entering a doorway into an indoor corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow upper alley, passing food stalls and steam vents, approaching a doorway

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at the food stall under the canopy

entered.detail: vents emitting white steam vapor into the alley, creating atmospheric haze
food vendor stall with red and white umbrella and green OPEN neon sign
bright red automated vending machine with product displays
tight concrete walls of the upper level passage

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the character enters a narrow upper alley filled with steam vapor and atmospheric lighting. A food stall with a glowing OPEN sign sits on the left while a red vending machine stands on the right. The environment is darker and more enclosed, with the character approaching a doorway leading indoors.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor corridor transitioning to back alley with scaffolding

events.description: entering indoor corridor with fluorescent lighting
exiting corridor into back alley with construction scaffolding

agents.ego_description: moving through an indoor corridor and exiting into a narrow back alley with construction elements

entered.detail: narrow covered walkway with walls on both sides and overhead fluorescent lighting
construction scaffolding structure with metal poles and platforms
long white fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a dimly lit indoor corridor with fluorescent tube lighting, then exits into a narrow back alley. Metal scaffolding appears on the left side, indicating construction or maintenance work. The environment maintains the industrial cyberpunk aesthetic with concrete surfaces and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated covered walkway with construction scaffolding and city views

events.description: passing a food cart vendor in the covered walkway
approaching overlook with view of lower city street through metal bars

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated covered walkway, passing pedestrians and a food cart, approaching an overlook

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at food cart preparing items under illuminated umbrella

entered.detail: overhead metal grating and mesh forming a protective ceiling over the walkway
mobile food cart with black umbrella and warm lighting, vendor serving food
metal bars and railing along the left side overlooking the lower level
view down through the railing to the street level below with buildings and lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated covered walkway with metal mesh overhead and scaffolding along the left side. A food vendor cart with an illuminated umbrella appears on the right. The walkway features a metal railing on the left offering a view down to the lower city street. The environment is industrial with concrete pillars and fluorescent lighting, maintaining the dense urban cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, open commercial district into the claustrophobic, industrial depths of an upper-city alleyway. It begins on a bustling neon-lit street, passing the green signage of the CAL EXPRESS building and a curved red structure as a futuristic sedan glides past. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the open sidewalk to a grand concrete staircase, ascending past teal industrial pipes and red neon lights toward a more enclosed upper level. The camera then follows the character into a steam-filled narrow alley punctuated by a glowing food stall and a red vending machine, before transitioning through a dimly lit indoor corridor with fluorescent tube lighting. Finally, the movement leads into a back alley and onto an elevated covered walkway, where metal scaffolding and mesh overhead frame a view back down to the lower city streets.
